---
title: "Snapshot Metrics"
---

This page uses the archived snapshot JSON stored in the repository.

```{=html}
<div id="chart-root"></div>
<script>
  fetch("data/pysal_metrics_snapshot.json")
    .then(response => {
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Failed to load snapshot JSON");
      return response.json();
    })
    .then(payload => renderRosePlot(payload, "chart-root"))
    .catch(err => {
      document.getElementById("chart-root").innerHTML =
        `<p style="color:red;">Could not load snapshot data: ${err.message}</p>`;
    });
</script>
